scripts.package:pack: pnpm package:prepare && npm pack dist/npm/leharness --pack-destination dist/npm
scripts.smoke: pnpm smoke:harness && pnpm smoke:mcp && pnpm smoke:apps
scripts.smoke:apps: pnpm -r build && pnpm exec tsx apps/cli/scripts/smoke-edit-file.ts && pnpm exec tsx apps/cli/scripts/smoke-background-tasks.ts && pnpm exec tsx apps/cli/scripts/smoke-bash-runtime.ts && pnpm exec tsx apps/cli/scripts/smoke-subagents.ts && pnpm exec tsx apps/cli/scripts/smoke-artifacts.ts && pnpm exec tsx apps/cli/scripts/smoke-compaction-e2e.ts && pnpm exec tsx apps/cli/scripts/smoke-mcp-adapter.ts && pnpm exec tsx apps/cli/scripts/smoke-oauth-loopback.ts && pnpm exec tsx apps/tui/scripts/smoke-transcript.ts && pnpm exec tsx apps/tui/scripts/smoke-prompt-input.ts && pnpm exec tsx apps/tui/scripts/smoke-picker.ts
